seoTitle: Thornlands vs Thornton Beach — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Thornlands vs Thornton Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Thornlands and Thornton Beach.
heading: Thornlands vs Thornton Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Thornlands, Queensland and Thornton Beach, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Thornton Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Thornlands (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Thornlands or Thornton Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Thornlands has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Thornton Beach scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Thornlands scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Thornton Beach scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Thornlands or Thornton Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Thornton Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
